notes: Multiple transfers exceeded free quota; took a -6 point penalty (2 extra transfers at -3 each). Brought in Freeman (USA), Munoz (COL), Araujo (URU), Messi (ARG captain) and Undav (GER). User flagged Uruguay was eliminated which made Araujo a poor decision in hindsight. Many teams rested starters in clinched-group MD3, which the model did not predict; the -6 hit returned roughly +1 on realised data.
